name: GenSyn10: A Multi-Generative AI Dataset For Benchmarking Image Classification
summary: arXiv:2607.16283v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The rapid advancement of generative AI has outpaced our ability to reliably detect its outputs, particularly when detectors encounter generators th...
description: arXiv:2607.16283v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The rapid advancement of generative AI has outpaced our ability to reliably detect its outputs, particularly when detectors encounter generators they have not seen before. We introduce GenSyn10, a CIFAR-10-aligned synthetic image dataset of 60,000 images (10 classes, 32$\times$32, 50k/10k split) generated using three architecturally diverse stat...
author: Md Faraz Kabir Khan, Saeed Anwar, Ghulam Mubashar Hassan
